articles.title: Tech jitters rock Wall Street: Nasdaq tumbles 2%, S&P 500 falls over 1% as AI worries rattle investors
articles.description: Indian markets saw a sharp fall on Thursday. Investors offloaded technology and transport shares. Concerns over artificial intelligence disruption weighed heavily. Job data also played a role. Markets await crucial inflation figures. This led to a broad market selloff across major indices.

articles.description: The council has agreed to pay £5,900 to the family of a child who was promised specialist technology to help them learn at home, which was never delivered

articles.title: Thanh-Huyen Truong Advances E-Commerce Model Innovation Through Digital Technology Integration and Cross-Border Platform Development
articles.description: A digital trade framework links infrastructure development with foreign investment growth by reducing transaction costs and improving market accessibility. Through multidimensional indicators and real-world platform implementation, the research demonstrates how digitalization strengthens cross-border commerce, SME participation, and economic modernization in evolving global trade ecosystems.

articles.title: Kobe 6 Protro 3D 2026: Nike brings back iconic sneaker with upgrades
articles.description: Along with upgraded technology, the shoe also comes with 3D glasses to make the upper stand out.
articles.content:
Nike’s newest Protro model may jump off the screen. That’s because it’s a remake of a famous 3D shoe model.
The updated Kobe 6 Protro 3D is available starting Friday, Feb. 13, at 10 a.m. ET for $200 a pair.
Returning 15 years after its initial releas... [472 chars]

articles.title: China Plans to Make Liability Insurance Mandatory for Drones by 2027
articles.description: China Plans to Make Liability Insurance Mandatory for Drones by 2027 - The guidelines also call for tailored insurance policies for different uses of the technology, such as logistics and emergency management
articles.content:
China is planning to make liability insurance mandatory for drones, setting a timeline to manage the growing risks associated with the country’s booming low-altitude economy.
A mandatory liability insurance system for unmanned aerial vehicles is to b... [328 chars]

articles.title: UPDATE 2-US, Taiwan finalize deal to cut tariffs, boost purchases of US goods
articles.description: The ⁠Taiwan government would guarantee another $250 billion in U.S. investments, Commerce Secretary Howard Lutnick said. The final language did not provide further details on those investments, but said Taiwan's representative office in ​the U.S. would collaborate with U.S. authorities to facilitate additional new greenfield and brownfield investments "in strategic high-technology manufacturing sectors, including AI, semiconductors, and advanced electronics." The deal ⁠will immediately eliminate Taiwan's tariffs of up to 26% on many U.S. agricultural imports, including beef, dairy and corn.
articles.content: Trump administration officials signed a final reciprocal trade agreement that confirmed a 15% U.S. tariff rate for imports from Taiwan, while committing Taiwan to a schedule for eliminating or lowering tariffs on nearly all U.S. ‌goods. The document ... [3007 chars]

articles.title: Wall St sinks as tech rout deepens on AI angst
articles.description: Wall Street indices fell sharply on Thursday, with the technology-heavy Nasdaq slumping 2%, as investors intensified their selloff of tech shares and fled transport stocks amid worries about artificial intelligence disruption.
articles.content:
NEW YORK: Wall Street indices fell sharply on Thursday, with the technology-heavy Nasdaq slumping 2%, as investors intensified their selloff of tech shares and fled transport stocks amid worries about artificial intelligence disruption.
